hero.subtitle: Immerse yourself in the ultimate Aegean escape. Where the deep blue of the sea meets the pure white of Cycladic architecture.

philosophy.title: The Blue Quartz Philosophy
philosophy.description: Inspired by the clarity of quartz crystals and the majestic aesthetics of world-class luxury, our suite offers a sanctuary of peace. Every detail has been curated to provide an atmosphere of refined elegance.

facilities.title: Superior Facilities
facilities.subtitle: Everything you need for an unforgettable stay

bedroom.title: Master Bedroom
bedroom.description: King-size bed with premium anatomic mattress for perfect sleep.

climate.title: Climate Control
climate.description: Full air-conditioning and heating for year-round comfort.

entertainment.title: Entertainment
entertainment.description: Smart TV with streaming services and high-speed Wi-Fi.

balcony.title: Sea View
balcony.description: Private balcony offering sweeping views of the Aegean Sea and unforgettable sunset skies.

kitchen.title: Full Kitchen
kitchen.description: Equipped with modern appliances to prepare your favorite meals.

showcase.title: Gallery Preview
showcase.subtitle: Browse the apartment spaces at a glance

status.empty: No photos available yet. Please check back soon.

houseRules.title: Good to Know Before You Arrive
houseRules.description: These simple rules help us keep the apartment clean, peaceful, and ready for every guest.

descriptions.bedroom: Immerse yourself in a serene master suite designed for deep rest and effortless comfort. Soft textures, carefully selected linens, and blackout curtains create a calm atmosphere, while thoughtful details make every evening feel peaceful and every morning feel refreshing.
descriptions.living-room: Our spacious living area invites you to unwind in style, with a generous corner sofa, warm ambient lighting, and an elegant open layout that connects comfort with sophistication. It is the ideal setting for slow mornings, family moments, or relaxed evenings after the beach.
descriptions.kitchen: The gourmet kitchen combines modern aesthetics with practical functionality, fully equipped for everything from quick breakfasts to complete home-cooked dinners. Premium appliances, quality cookware, and a clean design ensure a smooth and enjoyable cooking experience.
descriptions.bathroom: Step into a refined bathroom experience where minimalist design meets everyday luxury. The walk-in rainfall shower, quality amenities, and soothing atmosphere are crafted to help you reset, recharge, and enjoy a true sense of wellness throughout your stay.
descriptions.veranda: The sea-view veranda is your private front-row seat to the natural beauty of Thassos. Enjoy sunrise coffee, golden-hour relaxation, and peaceful evenings with a gentle breeze, surrounded by open views that make every moment feel memorable.
descriptions.default: Experience absolute comfort in our premises.

bedroom: Washing machine on the back balcony
Extra pillows, blankets, and fresh linens
living-room: Large corner sofa for comfortable lounging
Convertible sofa for extra sleeping space
Smart TV with streaming, including Netflix
High-speed Wi-Fi throughout the entire property
kitchen: Fully equipped kitchen with complete cookware
Pots, pans, oven trays, and essential utensils
Water and wine glasses with full tableware set
Espresso machine, kettle, and coffee filters
Dishwasher for quick and effortless cleanup
bathroom: Hand soap and fresh toilet paper
Hair dryer available for daily use
veranda: Outdoor table with comfortable chairs for dining and relaxing
Open sea view with beautiful sunset moments
Fresh coastal breeze for calm mornings and peaceful nights
default: Premium amenities with carefully selected details

noSmoking.title: No Smoking Indoors
noSmoking.description: Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the apartment. You may use outdoor areas responsibly.

noParties.title: No Parties or Events
noParties.description: Parties and loud gatherings are not allowed to protect the space and respect the neighborhood.

quietHours.title: Respect Quiet Hours
quietHours.description: Please keep noise low during local quiet hours and be considerate of nearby residents.

checkIn.title: Check-In After 15:00
checkIn.description: Arrival is available after 3:00 PM so the apartment can be fully cleaned and prepared.

checkOut.title: Check-Out Before 10:00
checkOut.description: Departure is before 10:00 AM to allow enough time for cleaning before the next guests.

damage.title: Report Any Damage
damage.description: Please inform the hosts immediately about any damage. Extensive damage may require compensation.

registeredGuests.title: Registered Guests Only
registeredGuests.description: Only guests included in the reservation are allowed to stay overnight in the property.

secureHome.title: Keep the Home Secure
secureHome.description: Lock doors and switch off air conditioning and appliances when leaving the apartment.

checkAvailability.title: Check Availability
checkAvailability.subtitle: Browse our calendar and secure your dates at Blue Quartz Apartment.
